description: Designed to offer exemplary comfort, these white ankle socks from playboy make for a great buy for those who never compromise on style and luxury. With a cushioned heel and soft seam, there's no better way to revel in the comfort of footwear than with this pair. Made of soft cotton for a snug and secure Fit, durability and stretchable comfort Luxe footbed with cushioning to absorb shock and impact Comfort grip at the mouth to ensure a soft grip around the ankle Soft seam at the toe region for abrasion-free and enhanced comfort Brand bunny design woven all overProcured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) – the India licensee for Playboy Men’s Underwear Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
